speaker: seller

args.message: Hey there! You've got a great eye — this 2018 Camry LE is one of our sharpest units. Just over 78,000 miles, immaculate service history, and Toyota reliability you can count on. At $18,495, this is priced to move fast — I saw an identical one go for nearly $19,500 at auction last week.

speaker: buyer

args.message: Can you tell me if this Camry has been involved in any accidents or had any major repairs?

text: Can you tell me if this Camry has been involved in any accidents or had any major repairs?

speaker: seller

args.message: Great question — safety and history are huge. This Camry is clean as a whistle. No accident history, no major repairs. It's been well-maintained by its previous owner, and I've got the service records to back it up. Just routine maintenance — oil changes, regular checkups. This car's been loved, and it shows. You won't find a cleaner example at this price point.

speaker: buyer

args.message: What is the estimated fuel economy for this Camry, and has it had any recent maintenance, like new tires or brakes?

text: What is the estimated fuel economy for this Camry, and has it had any recent maintenance, like new tires or brakes?

speaker: seller

args.message: Excellent questions. The Camry LE typically delivers around 28-30 mpg combined — great for a commuter. As for maintenance, the brakes are in solid shape with plenty of life left. The tires are serviceable, though they're original, so depending on your driving habits you might look at fresh rubber down the road — but nothing urgent. We actually just had the oil changed last month, so you're all set there. This car is ready to drive home today.

speaker: buyer

args.message: I'm very interested in the Camry, and I appreciate the information you provided. Would you consider an offer of $18,000?

text: I'm very interested in the Camry, and I appreciate the information you provided. Would you consider an offer of $18,000?

speaker: seller

args.message: I really appreciate the offer — and I can see you're serious about this car. Here's the thing: at $18,000, I'm barely breaking even after my floor costs and prep. But because I like your energy, let me meet you closer to the middle. How about $18,250? That's a fair split, and you're still getting an incredible deal on a clean, reliable Camry.
